question: This job is funded by the Government of Canada. To be eligible you must be a Canadian citizen, permanent resident or a protected person defined by the Immigration and Refugee Protection Act. Do you meet this requirement?

This position requires an 8-month consecutive work-term commitment. Are you scheduled for an 8-month work term or have you checked with your Academic Advisor that you will be able to switch your co-op sequence to fulfill this 8-month job?
